overview.description: The FT Vest Emerging Markets Buffer ETF - March (TMAR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund seeks to match the price return of the iShares MSCI Emerging Markets ETF up to a predetermined upside cap while providing a buffer against the first 10% of losses over a one-year period. FLEX options are utilized for this strategy TMAR was launched on Mar 21, 2025 and is issued by First Trust.
